cot_prefix: Okay, so I need to figure out if following these steps brings me back to the starting point. Let me break it down step by step. First, the instructions say to always face forward. So my direction is fixed; I don't turn left or right. I start facing forward, which I'll consider as the positive y-direction on a coordinate system. But wait, when you take steps backward, you're moving opposite to the direction you're facing. So if I'm facing forward (let's say that's up), moving backward would be moving down.
